name: Flood Docks
description: Black water slaps at concrete pilings while cargo nets sway like they are listening.
detail: Someone welded new ladders onto old flood markers. Every barge looks both abandoned and recently paid for.

fixtures.name: moored barge
fixtures.inspect: The barge sits low in the water under a tarp that smells like clinic coolant and wet rope.

fixtures.name: bollards
fixtures.inspect: Every bollard is wrapped in fresh chain and old superstition.

mood: Black water is slapping the pilings with the kind of regularity that makes timekeepers nervous.
Tonight a barge has been tied with a knot the docks have not used in years.
Two of the floodlamps are out; the third is covering for both and pretending.

scavenge.note: You check the mooring lines and rotten lockers for anything that floated free and stayed quiet.
scavenge.message: The docks surrender a ration tube, a dock chit, and a fistful of damp notes.
